analysis_result: HSC1λ-gPTCH1 mean colony count = 125.50 ± 10.85 (SD) vs HSC1λ-gGFP = 0.00, n = 8, Welch's t-test t=32.72, p=6.45e-09.
discrepancy_analysis: Model mean (125.50) agrees with reported (~132) within ~4.9% relative difference, well within the ±10% concordance tolerance. Both groups' HSC1λ-gGFP means are 0. Both p-values are highly significant (<0.0001). The reported value in the paper is approximate (~132), and the exact underlying mean computed from MOESM10 Fig 5g source data is 125.50. Conclusion: CONCORDANT.
